steps.title: Write each person's total charge
steps.content: Marco charges $12 + 9.25x$ (his \$12 equipment fee plus \$9.25 per hour), and Priya charges $6 + 10.75x$ (her \$6 equipment fee plus \$10.75 per hour).

steps.title: Solve for when Priya's charge is greater
steps.content:
Set up the inequality for when Priya's total exceeds Marco's:
$$6 + 10.75x \gt 12 + 9.25x$$
Combining like terms:
$$10.75x - 9.25x \gt 12 - 6$$
$$1.5x \gt 6$$
$$x \gt 4$$
D is correct.
